endings.title: A Life Reclaimed
endings.narrative: When the dust settles, Sirius Black walks free. With Cornelius Fudge himself as witness, the Ministry can no longer deny what was always true: Peter Pettigrew lives, Sirius is innocent, and Voldemort has returned. The Order of the Phoenix gains a soldier; Harry gains the godfather he was always promised. The trap that was meant to claim a life instead exposed the rot at the heart of the Ministry.

endings.title: The Veil Closes
endings.narrative: There are some choices that cannot be unmade. Sirius is gone — through the Veil, behind a fugitive's name, or into the deeper silence that follows a war's first true loss. The vision Voldemort planted bore exactly the fruit it was meant to bear. Harry returns to a Hogwarts that has already begun to forget, carrying a single, unchangeable truth: that some traps spring closed faster than the heart can decide.
